variants.title: Filtrec WX263 Special Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WX263. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WX263 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Outer Diameter: 200.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 110.0 mm, Length: 283.0 mm, Seal Material: Feltro, Temperature Range: -10 - +100°C, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Seal: Feltro
